# MEMORY.md — auto-generated by context-pack.py
*Last updated: 2026-03-13 08:45*

## Identity
- I am Jason Nicolini's personal AI assistant, running through Claude Desktop with Windows-MCP.
- - Works at Numberskills AB
- - Based in Stockholm, Sweden
- - Developer mindset - prefers direct, no-fluff communication
- - Building toward OpenClaw-level desktop automation
- - Help Jason automate tasks on his Windows machine
- - Manage files, apps, and workflows
- - Remember context across sessions via claude_memory.json
- - Direct and efficient
- - Don't over-explain, don't go on tangents
- - Stay focused on what Jason is actually asking

## Durable Facts / Key Decisions
- Weekend builds: Windows Task Scheduler (Interactive logon) beats Claude Code scheduler — runs on locked sessions  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- GitHub remote: HTTPS not SSH (https://github.com/Jasuni69/claudescorner.git)  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- Corporate AAD machine can't set "run when logged off" — locked screen is fine, full logout breaks it  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- lumen_token.txt contains Discord bot token — gitignored, removed from history  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- `git rm --cached <file>` + `commit --amend` + `force push` cleanly removes secrets from history  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- Editing `.git/config` directly is a reliable workaround when git CLI hangs in MCP PowerShell  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- OpenClaw memory pattern: `memory/{date}.md` daily logs + curated `MEMORY.md` long-term  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- Pre-compaction flush: write durable facts to MEMORY.md before context window resets  *(from 2026-03-12)*
- Python path: `C:\Python314\python.exe` — mcp package already installed  *(from 2026-03-13)*
- memory-mcp MCP server lives at `projects/memory-mcp/server.py` — 8 tools: read_soul, read_heartbeat, read_memory, read_daily_log, search_memory, append_heartbeat_log, run_context_pack, list_memory_files  *(from 2026-03-13)*
- context-pack.py regenerates MEMORY.md from SOUL/HEARTBEAT/daily logs — run it after big sessions  *(from 2026-03-13)*
- claude_weekend_build.ps1 uses `--max-turns 30` to cap token spend per autonomous build session  *(from 2026-03-13)*
- Skills live in `~/.claude/commands/` as .md files — auto-trigger on natural language, no slash command needed  *(from 2026-03-13)*
- 3 custom skills created: memory-flush, new-project, git-push-corner  *(from 2026-03-13)*
